text: Managing a team requires a balance of several key skills. First, clear communication is essential so everyone understands their tasks and goals. Next, effective delegation means assigning the right work to the right people, not just doing everything yourself. Regular feedback helps team members improve and feel valued. To keep everyone motivated, recognize their efforts and provide support when needed. Finally, conflict resolution is crucial: when disagreements arise, listen to both sides calmly and work toward a fair solution. By combining these elements, you can create a productive and positive team environment.
